def positive_tar_extractall_unfiltered():
    rule_id = "tar_extractall_unfiltered"
    family = "quality"
    severity = "contextual"
    status = "stable"
    intent = "captures the smell described by this rule"
    description = "tarfile.extractall(...) without an obvious filter, members list, or path-validation helper."
    return rule_id, family, severity, status, intent, description
